summary: Comprehensive testing of Construction CRM Pre-Sales and Sales modules. All requested features working correctly: Pre-Sales board with kanban stages, Appointment Booking dialog when moving to final stage, Sales board with transferred leads, Lead detail dialog with tabs (Overview, Summary, Follow-ups, Remarks), lead editing, appointment details display, login redirects to role-specific pages.

minor.issue: 429 errors occur when making rapid API calls in tests, requires delays between requests

success_rate.backend: 100% (10 passed, 4 skipped due to rate limiting)

seed_data_creation: Test leads created: TEST_Appointment_Lead_*, TEST_ApptBooking_*, TEST_NoAppt_*
context_for_next_testing_agent: All CRM features verified working: 1) Pre-Sales kanban board loads with 6 stages (New Lead, Contacted, Proposal, RNR, Follow-up, Appointment Booked as final), 2) Appointment Booking dialog appears when moving lead to final stage with Date, Time, Visit Type fields (Office/Online/Home), 3) Book an Appointment button disabled until all fields filled, 4) After booking, lead transfers to Sales with appointment data stored, 5) Sales board shows transferred leads with 'From Pre-Sales' badge, 6) Sales lead detail has tabs (Overview, Summary, Follow-ups, Remarks), 7) Appointment details displayed if present (Date, Time, Type), 8) Edit button opens dialog with Name, Email, Phone, Address editable, 9) Summary tab allows writing/saving, 10) Follow-ups tab allows scheduling with date/note, 11) Remarks tab allows adding remarks, 12) Login redirects to role-specific page without Loading spinner or Super Admin flash. Rate limiting aggressive - use delays between API calls.

features_tested.Pre-Sales Board: PASS - Kanban with 6 stages, Total Leads stats, search, view toggle
features_tested.Appointment Booking Dialog: PASS - Date, Time, Visit Type fields, Book button disabled validation
features_tested.Lead Transfer to Sales: PASS - appointment_date, appointment_time, appointment_type stored on transfer
features_tested.Sales Board: PASS - Kanban with 8 stages, RE stats, shows transferred leads with badge
features_tested.Sales Lead Detail Dialog: PASS - Tabs (Overview, Summary, Follow-ups, Remarks), Edit button
features_tested.Appointment Details Display: PASS - Shows Date, Time, Type in Overview tab
features_tested.Lead Edit Dialog: PASS - Name, Email, Phone, Address, City, State, Notes editable
features_tested.Summary Tab: PASS - Input field and Save Summary button
features_tested.Follow-ups Tab: PASS - Date picker, Note input, Add button
features_tested.Remarks Tab: PASS - Input field and Add button
features_tested.Login Redirect: PASS - Pre-Sales to /crm-pre-sales, Sales to /crm-sales, no Super Admin flash
